title: PACT Mark-Read Request
description: Request body for POST /api/pact/{fabricId}/mark-read. The caller acknowledges that it has received and processed events in the range [from, to] (inclusive). Either the _event_id pair OR the _sequence_number pair is sufficient; if both are provided they MUST be consistent. Added in PACT v2.0.3 (§4.4.4).

from_event_id.description: Inclusive lower bound of the acknowledged event range, by event id.

to_event_id.description: Inclusive upper bound of the acknowledged event range, by event id.

from_sequence_number.description: Inclusive lower bound, by per-fabric sequence number.

to_sequence_number.description: Inclusive upper bound, by per-fabric sequence number.

authorization_proof.description: Optional. Cross-org calls at Authorization-Required MUST carry a valid proof; verifier_id MUST equal the server's DID.
